footer.description: Your bicycle marketplace in Mallorca. We connect cyclists with local workshops to create the best cycling experience on the island.

hero.subtitle: The most complete bicycle and cycling services marketplace in Mallorca

landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need in one place
landing.featuresSubtitle: We connect cyclists with the best workshops and products in Mallorca
landing.advancedSearchDesc: Smart filters to find your ideal bike
landing.verifiedWorkshopsDesc: Network of certified professionals across Mallorca
landing.bikeRentalDesc: Discover Mallorca by bike. Rent the best bikes from verified workshops starting at 15€/day.
landing.perfectPlanDesc: Manage your business, sell more and connect with thousands of cyclists in Mallorca
landing.vatIncluded: VAT included · No commitment · Cancel anytime
landing.feature5: Catalog visible to thousands of users
landing.trialNote: 7 days free, then 18.30€/month · Card required, no charges during trial

home.discoverRoute312: Discover Route 312 and explore Mallorca by bike
home.exploreBikesDesc: Find the perfect bike to rent
home.myRentalsDesc: View and manage your bike rentals
home.route312Desc: 312 km of epic roads through the Serra de Tramuntana. The same route used by Tour de France professionals for training.
home.needHelpWorkshopDesc: We're here to help you grow your business and connect with cyclists from around the world.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your platform experience
settings.privacyNote: Your personal information is protected and will never be shared with third parties without your consent.
settings.workshopSettingsNote: Workshop-specific settings are available in the "My Workshops" section. From there you can manage schedules, services, and other business information.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

cookies.message: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and offer you personalized content. By clicking "Accept", you consent to their use. You can get more information in our

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: We connect cyclists and workshops in Mallorca to facilitate rental, repair and equipment purchase in one place.
aboutUs.missionDesc: We want getting around Mallorca by bike to be easier, safer and more sustainable. We bring together the cycling community and local workshops on a clear and fast platform.
aboutUs.whatWeDoDesc: On RodaMallorca you can discover rental bikes, cycling products and specialized workshops. We also promote local commerce so that cyclists and professionals grow together.
aboutUs.commitmentDesc: We work with local businesses and services adapted to the territory, prioritizing quality of care and the real experience of users on the island.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: We resolve your questions about bookings, payments, returns and general operation of RodaMallorca.
helpCenter.bookingsDesc: You can check availability, confirm rental and manage cancellations from your account. If the establishment offers changes, you can request them from the order detail.
helpCenter.paymentsDesc: The platform processes payments securely. In each order you will see the payment status and, when applicable, the corresponding invoice.
helpCenter.supportDesc: If you need additional help, write to us at info@rodamallorca.com and we will respond as soon as possible.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Publish, rent or find workshop services in three simple steps within RodaMallorca.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Search by bike type, product or workshop and filter by location, category or availability to see relevant options in Mallorca.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Make your rental booking or buy your favorite products. If you need repair or maintenance, contact the workshop from the platform.
howItWorks.step3Desc: After the service, share your experience. Reviews help improve quality and help other users find better options.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Learn how we collect and protect your personal data when you use RodaMallorca.
privacy.dataDesc: We collect basic account data, contact information and activity within the platform to provide and improve the service.
privacy.purposeDesc: We use your data to manage bookings, payments, support communication and user experience improvement.
privacy.rightsDesc: You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data by writing to info@rodamallorca.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Consult the terms of use of the RodaMallorca platform for users and partner businesses.
terms.usageDesc: By using RodaMallorca you agree to use the service in a legal, responsible and respectful manner with other users and partners.
terms.bookingsDesc: Each workshop or store may have specific cancellation, change and return policies that will be shown before confirmation.
terms.responsibilitiesDesc: RodaMallorca acts as a connection platform between users and businesses. Each provider is responsible for the quality of their service and the information published.

routes.title: Recommended Routes
routes.subtitle: Discover recommended cycling routes in Mallorca for different levels and pedaling styles.
routes.beginnerDesc: A smooth ride with sea views, ideal for enjoying the island with frequent stops and a relaxed pace.
routes.intermediateDesc: A mixed stretch for those who want to combine rural landscape, moderate elevation and secondary roads.
routes.expertDesc: Demanding climbs and technical descents for experienced cyclists, with equipment recommendations and prior workshop inspection.

routes.sectionSubtitle: Explore the best routes on the island before booking your bike
routes.ctaText: Already have a route? Rent the perfect bike for it
